methodology: DayDine RCS v3.4.1 visibility model + V4 operator report shell

headline.tracking_status: Strong public visibility; protect position and monitor nearby score clusters

components.name: Trust & Compliance
components.summary: Strong compliance evidence. FHRS rating 5 with recent inspection evidence.

components.name: Customer Validation
components.summary: Strong Google evidence, but currently single-platform.

components.name: Commercial Readiness
components.summary: Website, menu and opening hours are present; direct booking/contact path is not confirmed.
components.evidence: Website yes · menu yes · hours 7/7 · booking/contact absent

monthly_tracking.label: Monthly movement
monthly_tracking.meaning: Future reports can show up/down movement

priorities.title: Add a second customer-platform listing
priorities.why: Customer Validation is currently single-platform. A second source would improve confidence and reduce reliance on Google alone.
priorities.action: Claim or strengthen an additional legitimate review/listing source such as TripAdvisor or OpenTable where appropriate.
priorities.expected_upside: Raises the achievable confidence class toward Rankable-A.

priorities.title: Publish a reachable phone number or direct booking link
priorities.why: The booking/contact path carries 25% of Commercial Readiness and is not confirmed in the public record.
priorities.action: Add a public phone number, direct reservation URL, or booking path to the main public listing.
priorities.expected_upside: Improves Commercial Readiness and reduces customer drop-off.

priorities.title: Defend review strength and score stability
priorities.why: Lambs is already in the public top 30 and sits close to other high-scoring venues.
priorities.action: Maintain legitimate review momentum and ensure listing accuracy does not degrade.
priorities.expected_upside: Protects rank within a tight score cluster.

commercial_impact.wording_guardrail: Directional estimate only. Exact numbers require internal cover and spend data.

watch_list: Emergence of a second review/listing platform
Movement of venues sharing the same rounded RCS score
